goal: Design a sound, scalable system architecture that directly addresses the task requirements
constraints: Components must be cohesive with minimal coupling
All dependencies must be explicitly named
Design must be implementable — no speculative or theoretical-only components
No hallucination — use established patterns only
success_criteria: Architecture is complete, components are well-defined, dependencies are explicit, and a developer can implement from this design
output_format: Component descriptions, their responsibilities, interfaces, and interaction flows
